items.Checklist Item: Are fire equipment provided, accessible, visible and unobstructed?
items.Non Compliance Text: Fire extinguishers were not adequately provided, accessible, visible and/or maintained where required.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, SANS 1910, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Provide and maintain suitable fire extinguishers in visible and accessible positions in accordance with the applicable fire safety requirements.

items.Checklist Item: Are fire equipment serviced and within valid service date?
items.Non Compliance Text: Fire equipment was not serviced, maintained and/or within a valid service date where required.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, SANS 1475, SANS 1910, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Ensure fire equipment is inspected, serviced and maintained by a competent service provider within the prescribed service intervals.

items.Checklist Item: Are fire extinguishers the correct size and type as per occupancy?
items.Non Compliance Text: Fire extinguishers are not the correct size or type.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T (4.37), Fire extinguishers to be provided in accordance with Table 15 for the applicable occupancy.

items.Checklist Item: Are fire extinguishers correctly positioned and installed?
items.Non Compliance Text: Fire extinguishers were not correctly positioned, mounted and/or readily accessible.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, SANS 1910, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Install and position fire extinguishers in visible, accessible and compliant locations in accordance with the applicable fire safety requirements.

items.Checklist Item: Are fire hose reels accessible, intact and unobstructed?
items.Non Compliance Text: Fire hose reels were obstructed, damaged, inaccessible and/or not maintained in a serviceable condition.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, SANS 543, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Ensure fire hose reels remain accessible, unobstructed and maintained in an operational condition at all times.

items.Checklist Item: Are hydrants or fire brigade connections accessible and not obstructed?
items.Non Compliance Text: Fire hydrants and/or fire brigade connections were obstructed, inaccessible or not adequately maintained.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, SANS 1128, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Maintain fire hydrants and fire brigade connections in a visible, accessible and operational condition for firefighting purposes.

items.Checklist Item: If required, are fire detection and alarm serviced and within valid service date?
items.Non Compliance Text: Fire detection and/or alarm systems were not serviced, maintained and/or within a valid service period where required.
items.Reference: SANS 10139, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Ensure fire detection and alarm systems are inspected, tested and serviced by a competent service provider within the prescribed service intervals.

items.Checklist Item: Is the fire alarm or detection panel accessible and indicating normal condition?
items.Non Compliance Text: The fire alarm and/or detection panel was inaccessible and/or indicated abnormal, fault or isolated conditions.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, SANS 10139, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Maintain fire alarm and detection panels accessible and ensure all faults, isolations or abnormal indications are investigated and rectified.

items.Checklist Item: Are detectors, manual call points and sounders unobstructed and not visibly damaged?
items.Non Compliance Text: Detectors, manual call points and/or sounders were obstructed, damaged or not adequately maintained.
items.Reference: SANS 10139, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Ensure detectors, manual call points and sounders remain unobstructed, visible and maintained in an operational condition.

items.Checklist Item: Are sprinkler, gas suppression or fixed firefighting systems accessible and free from visible impairment?
items.Non Compliance Text: Fixed firefighting systems were inaccessible, impaired and/or showed visible signs of damage, isolation or non-operational condition.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, SANS 10287, SANS 246, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Ensure fixed firefighting systems remain accessible, operational and free from visible impairment, damage or unauthorised isolation.

items.Checklist Item: Are control valves, panels or system interfaces accessible and not tampered with?
items.Non Compliance Text: Control valves, fire system panels and/or system interfaces were inaccessible, tampered with or not adequately protected from interference.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Maintain fire protection control valves, panels and interfaces accessible, secured and protected against tampering or unauthorised interference.

items.Checklist Item: Are escape routes clear of storage, furniture, stock or obstruction?
items.Non Compliance Text: Escape routes were obstructed and/or not maintained clear of storage, stock, furniture or other obstructions.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, Occupational Health and Safety Act, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Remove all obstructions from escape routes and maintain clear emergency egress pathways at all times.

items.Checklist Item: Do exit doors open freely without special knowledge, tools or keys?
items.Non Compliance Text: Exit doors did not open freely and/or required keys, tools or special knowledge for emergency egress.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, Occupational Health and Safety Act, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Ensure exit doors remain readily openable from the inside without the use of keys, tools or specialised knowledge during emergency conditions.

items.Checklist Item: Are stairways, corridors and lobbies free from combustible storage?
items.Non Compliance Text: Stairways, corridors and/or lobbies contained combustible storage or materials that may compromise safe evacuation.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, Occupational Health and Safety Act, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Remove combustible storage from stairways, corridors and lobbies and maintain these areas clear for safe evacuation purposes.

items.Checklist Item: Are exit signs visible, correctly positioned and unobstructed?
items.Non Compliance Text: Exit signage was not visible, correctly positioned, illuminated and/or unobstructed where required.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, SANS 1186-1, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Provide and maintain compliant exit signage in visible and unobstructed positions to assist effective emergency evacuation.

items.Checklist Item: Are emergency lights installed where required and visibly operational?
items.Non Compliance Text: Emergency lighting was not provided where required and/or was not visibly operational.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Provide and maintain emergency lighting systems to ensure safe evacuation during power failure or emergency conditions.

items.Checklist Item: Do the hazardous substances need to be registered?
items.Non Compliance Text: There was no evidence that hazardous substances stored and/or handled on the premises were registered where required by the applicable authority.
items.Reference: Applicable SANS code related to specific class hazardous substance, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Determine whether hazardous substances stored and/or handled exceed the prescribed threshold quantities and register the installation where required.

items.Checklist Item: If required, is the certificate of registration valid and within the expiry date?
items.Non Compliance Text: No valid hazardous substances certificate of registration was available at the time of inspection where required.
items.Reference: Applicable SANS code related to specific class hazardous substance, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Obtain and maintain a valid hazardous substances certificate of registration for the applicable installation or storage area.

items.Checklist Item: Is the hazardous substance installation/storeroom according to standard?
items.Non Compliance Text: The hazardous substance installation and/or storage area did not comply with the applicable fire safety and hazardous substance requirements.
items.Reference: Applicable SANS code related to specific class hazardous substance, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Ensure hazardous substance installations and storage areas comply with the applicable SANS standards and fire safety requirements.

items.Checklist Item: Is combustible storage controlled and kept away from ignition sources?
items.Non Compliance Text: Combustible materials were not adequately controlled and/or were stored in close proximity to ignition sources.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, Occupational Health and Safety Act, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Control combustible storage and maintain adequate separation from ignition sources to reduce fire risk.

items.Checklist Item: Are plant rooms, electrical rooms and service areas free from unrelated storage?
items.Non Compliance Text: Plant rooms, electrical rooms and/or service areas contained unrelated storage or combustible materials.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, Occupational Health and Safety Act, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Remove unrelated storage and combustible materials from plant rooms, electrical rooms and service areas.

items.Checklist Item: Are DB boards accessible, closed and clearly identifiable?
items.Non Compliance Text: Distribution boards were not adequately accessible, secured, labelled and/or clearly identifiable.
items.Reference: Occupational Health and Safety Act, Electrical Installation Regulations, SANS 10142-1
items.Corrective Action: Ensure distribution boards remain accessible, properly secured and clearly labelled for identification and emergency isolation purposes.

items.Checklist Item: Are extension leads, multiplugs and temporary wiring controlled and not overloaded?
items.Non Compliance Text: Extension leads, multiplugs and/or temporary electrical wiring were improperly used, uncontrolled and/or overloaded.
items.Reference: Occupational Health and Safety Act, Electrical Installation Regulations, SANS 10142-1
items.Corrective Action: Control the use of extension leads and temporary wiring and prevent overloading of electrical circuits and adapters.

items.Checklist Item: Are there no visible exposed wires, damaged fittings or unsafe electrical conditions?
items.Non Compliance Text: Visible exposed wiring, damaged electrical fittings and/or unsafe electrical conditions were observed on the premises.
items.Reference: Occupational Health and Safety Act, Electrical Installation Regulations, SANS 10142-1
items.Corrective Action: Repair or replace damaged electrical components and rectify unsafe electrical conditions using a competent person.

items.Checklist Item: Are fire doors closed, unobstructed and not wedged open?
items.Non Compliance Text: Fire doors were obstructed, wedged open and/or not maintained in the required closed position.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, SANS 1253
items.Corrective Action: Ensure fire doors are maintained operational, unobstructed and self-closing in accordance with the applicable fire protection requirements.

items.Checklist Item: Are visible fire doors, seals, closers and hinges in acceptable condition?
items.Non Compliance Text: Visible fire door components, including seals, hinges and/or door closers, were not maintained in an acceptable condition.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, SANS 1253
items.Corrective Action: Service or replace defective fire door components to ensure the fire door operates as intended.

items.Checklist Item: Are visible fire separation elements and service penetrations intact where observable?
items.Non Compliance Text: Visible fire separation elements and/or service penetrations were not adequately sealed or maintained where observable.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T
items.Corrective Action: Reinstate fire separation integrity and seal service penetrations using suitable fire-stopping materials or systems.

items.Checklist Item: Are storage areas arranged to maintain aisles, access and clear firefighting routes?
items.Non Compliance Text: Storage arrangements obstructed aisles, access routes and/or firefighting access pathways.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-T, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Reorganise storage to maintain clear aisles, access routes and firefighting pathways at all times.

items.Checklist Item: Is there an approved fire or internal layout plan available?
items.Non Compliance Text: No approved fire and/or internal layout plan was available for inspection.
items.Reference: SANS 10400-A, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Provide and maintain approved fire and/or internal layout plans available for inspection and emergency response purposes.

items.Checklist Item: Are kitchen extraction systems serviced and certificate available?
items.Non Compliance Text: Kitchen extraction systems were not adequately serviced and/or no valid service certificate was available for inspection.
items.Reference: SANS 1850, Occupational Health and Safety Act, Applicable Municipal Fire Safety By-laws
items.Corrective Action: Ensure kitchen extraction systems are inspected, cleaned and serviced by a competent service provider and maintain valid service certification on site.

items.Checklist Item: Are tenant escape routes clear and unobstructed?
Are fire extinguishers visible, accessible and serviced?
Are exit signs and emergency lights visible and operational?
Are DB boards accessible and not blocked by stock or furniture?
Is stock storage controlled and not obstructing exits or fire equipment?
Are common malls, corridors and escape routes clear of obstructions?
Are fire doors in common areas kept closed and unobstructed?
Are hose reels, hydrants, extinguishers and fire panels accessible?
Are fire detection or alarm panels free from fault or isolation indications?
Is storage arranged to maintain access aisles and firefighting access?
Is storage kept below lights, electrical fittings and fire safety installations where required?
Are combustible materials stored away from ignition sources?
Are hose reels, hydrants or fire extinguishers accessible and unobstructed?
Are fire doors, smoke doors or compartment lines unobstructed?
Is the plant room free from unrelated storage and combustible materials?
Are electrical panels accessible and clearly labelled?
Are ventilation openings clear and unobstructed?
Are customer escape routes clear and unobstructed?
Are displays and stock not blocking fire equipment or exits?
Are storerooms kept orderly with controlled combustible storage?
Are staff exits and escape paths clear?
Are guest escape routes clearly indicated and unobstructed?
Are bedroom or corridor exit signs visible where required?
Are fire extinguishers accessible and maintained?
Are staff aware of emergency procedures?
